mapper.sql: SELECT id, batch_no, style_no, order_no, result, pass_rate, sample_qty, defect_qty, inspector_id, inspector_name, factory_id, status, reject_reason, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM t_erp_qc_inspection
mapper.select: WHERE batch_no = #{batchNo} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN result = 'HOLD' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingCount, SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS todayChecked, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(pass_rate), 1), 0) AS passRate, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT inspection_id) FROM t_erp_qc_defect_record WHERE defect_level = 'CRITICAL') AS criticalCount FROM t_erp_qc_inspection WHERE factory_id = #{factoryId} AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)

SELECT dr.defect_type AS name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM t_erp_qc_defect_record dr INNER JOIN t_erp_qc_inspection qi ON dr.inspection_id = qi.id WHERE qi.factory_id = #{factoryId} AND qi.create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY dr.defect_type ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 5
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_erp_qc_inspection ( batch_no, style_no, order_no, result, pass_rate, sample_qty, defect_qty, inspector_id, inspector_name, factory_id, status, remark, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{batchNo}, #{styleNo}, #{orderNo}, #{result}, #{passRate}, #{sampleQty}, #{defectQty}, #{inspectorId}, #{inspectorName}, #{factoryId}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, NOW() )
